title: n@sa' #5376
definition:
1) to lift, bear, take, carry
    1a) (P'al) to take
    1b) (Ithpael) to make a rising, make an insurrection
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to lift, bear, take, carry
    1a) (P'al) to take
    1b) (Ithpael) to make a rising, make an insurrection

    NASB:  to lift, take, carry
